title: Focșani, Vrancea — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Focșani, Vrancea: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Focșani is a city in Vrancea with a population of 73,868. A city in eastern Romania known for its wine production, the Union Monument marking the unification of Moldavia and Wallachia, and its strategic location.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
